title: rubus compactus
intro: Rubus compactus, also known as the compact raspberry or alpine raspberry, is a type of deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds that exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Rubus compactus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various conditions. Herbal preparations of Rubus compactus can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote digestive health and reduce symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions.
